creator: darren.henderson@gmail.com
text:
From pkg's output that is not clear. 

If this were in a larger upgrade set it would be even more obfuscated. 

I'm not sure where I could have looked to find the info - checking the commits for yt-dlp is not obvious.  

gpodder still has a youtube_dl dependency and neither youtube_dl or yt-dlp are mentioned in /usr/ports/UPDATING. There is nothing in the pkg info for youtube_dl indicating that it has been superseded. 

That seems problematic.
